vacancy_details.Post Name: Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pgimer.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PGIMER Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this job is Offline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator post is Rs. 10,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is Graduate. A Master's degree, Diploma, or Advanced Diploma in Clinical Research is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Medical Transcriptionist and Data Entry Operator post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CHMO/2026/535.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for General/OBC categories.

faq.question: Q10. Where is PGIMER located?
faq.answer: PGIMER is located in Chandigarh.
